subject: Re: +
body:
You've asked me to e-mail you  with questions ...it's
been ten days , with absolutely nothing to do for me ,
no errands, responsibiity, no ghislaine , celina, or
Sarah... , is that right?.. I love you

--- nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com> wrote:

> 
>   I don’t know why you want to waste your time
> making these sarcastic comments… Hopefully you
> understand it is not helpful in any way and are just
> doing it because you can‘t help yourself.. 
>   I want to make clear that I was just doing what
> Ghislaine had told me with the apartments. We were
> not redecorating all of them at once as it tends to
> get confusing. Jen was taking care of 8A and I was
> doing 3F. First we moved everything out, then it got
> painted and I picked new furniture from Ethan Allan,
> which Ghislaine agreed to as it was going to be a
> ‘serious‘ & ‘mature’ apartment. Then Ghislaine left,
> you said you hated Ethan Allan, I cancelled the
> order, ordered white bedroom furniture from Crate&
> Barrel. Then you said we should also change the
> carpet in 3F, told me to decorate everything in a
> completely different style than we initially
> intended and get all the apartments done at the same
> time; I was doing what I was told, first by
> Ghislaine, then by you. That’s why it is taking this
> long.
>   As far as the home show, I didn’t say I was
> bothered by it, I was just pointing it out as one of
> the things I wouldn’t have chosen to do, had you not
> asked me to. I could have spent that time in a way,
> you would appreciate more. But I don’t want to focus
> on the home show as it was just a fraction of the
> time I spend on the projects you gave me. I
> explained that in the first email…
>   I’ve spent a lot of time in the past doing petty
> things I thought were helpful but I learned that
> neither one of us benefits from it. As a result you
> are not any happier and I haven’t done anything for
> myself. Since I met you, my life revolves around
> you, there is nothing else I have and it makes me
> feel very uneasy. I feel that I have no security;
> like Jean Luc says , all my eggs are in one basket.
> I don’t like taking things from you. I want to be
> able to support myself. You are the expert in that,
> you don’t believe in school; so how do I learn and
> what ? 
>   This is getting a little crazy, I love you.. I am
> going to try to make this very clear; I can agree on
> exercise, organizing fun things for you, whether
> interesting massages and treatments or finding
> interesting people and…fun sex things…What do you
> imagine is a fun sex thing? I will do what I can
> even though if this is simply about you having sex
> with someone else, I don‘t know how it makes our
> relationship better. I will try to find girls
> whenever we are in New York . I‘ll speak to Nathalie
> & try other places before having to go to clubs
> though. Please, don’t expect a 360 turn by tomorrow.
> It will probably take time until I get it right. I
> suggest I stay in NY for a week or two, but it is up
> to you. I would appreciate If you are not happy or
> want something to happen, you just said it once and
> clearly. In fact, you can send me a sentence in an
> email so there is no confusion. Is there something
> else that is important to you, or do we agree on
> this? 
>   PS: Here is a bonus; I will have a dinner with
> Dana.
>    
>    
> 
> __________________________________________________
> Do You Yahoo!?
> Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam
> protection around 
> http://mail.yahoo.com 


__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
body_html:
You've asked me to e-mail you with questions ...it's
been ten days , with absolutely nothing to do for me ,
no errands, responsibiity, no ghislaine , celina, or
Sarah... , is that right?.. I love you

--- nadia marcinkova nadja2102@yahoo.com wrote:

I don’t know why you want to waste your time
making these sarcastic comments… Hopefully you
understand it is not helpful in any way and are just
doing it because you can‘t help yourself..
I want to make clear that I was just doing what
Ghislaine had told me with the apartments. We were
not redecorating all of them at once as it tends to
get confusing. Jen was taking care of 8A and I was
doing 3F. First we moved everything out, then it got
painted and I picked new furniture from Ethan Allan,
which Ghislaine agreed to as it was going to be a
‘serious‘ & ‘mature’ apartment. Then Ghislaine left,
you said you hated Ethan Allan, I cancelled the
order, ordered white bedroom furniture from Crate&
Barrel. Then you said we should also change the
carpet in 3F, told me to decorate everything in a
completely different style than we initially
intended and get all the apartments done at the same
time; I was doing what I was told, first by
Ghislaine, then by you. That’s why it is taking this
long.
As far as the home show, I didn’t say I was
bothered by it, I was just pointing it out as one of
the things I wouldn’t have chosen to do, had you not
asked me to. I could have spent that time in a way,
you would appreciate more. But I don’t want to focus
on the home show as it was just a fraction of the
time I spend on the projects you gave me. I
explained that in the first email…
I’ve spent a lot of time in the past doing petty
things I thought were helpful but I learned that
neither one of us benefits from it. As a result you
are not any happier and I haven’t done anything for
myself. Since I met you, my life revolves around
you, there is nothing else I have and it makes me
feel very uneasy. I feel that I have no security;
like Jean Luc says , all my eggs are in one basket.
I don’t like taking things from you. I want to be
able to support myself. You are the expert in that,
you don’t believe in school; so how do I learn and
what ?
This is getting a little crazy, I love you.. I am
going to try to make this very clear; I can agree on
exercise, organizing fun things for you, whether
interesting massages and treatments or finding
interesting people and…fun sex things…What do you
imagine is a fun sex thing? I will do what I can
even though if this is simply about you having sex
with someone else, I don‘t know how it makes our
relationship better. I will try to find girls
whenever we are in New York . I‘ll speak to Nathalie
& try other places before having to go to clubs
though. Please, don’t expect a 360 turn by tomorrow.
It will probably take time until I get it right. I
suggest I stay in NY for a week or two, but it is up
to you. I would appreciate If you are not happy or
want something to happen, you just said it once and
clearly. In fact, you can send me a sentence in an
email so there is no confusion. Is there something
else that is important to you, or do we agree on
this?
PS: Here is a bonus; I will have a dinner with
Dana.

Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam? Yahoo! Mail has the best spam
protection around
http://mail.yahoo.com

Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam? Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around
http://mail.yahoo.com

subject: Re: +
body:
MOst people are both unhapy and  normal.. they
followed "normal advice"   if you want to be out of
the normal success, you have to follow, out of the
normal advice.. even crazy advice

> though. Please, don’t expect a 360 turn by tomorrow.

> clearly. In fact, you can send me a sentence in an
> email so there is no confusion. Is there something
> else that is important to you, or do we agree on

> Dana.

MOst people are both unhapy and normal.. they
followed "normal advice" if you want to be out of
the normal success, you have to follow, out of the
normal advice.. even crazy advice

--- nadia marcinkova nadja2102@yahoo.com wrote:

I don’t know why you want to waste your time
making these sarcastic comments… Hopefully you
understand it is not helpful in any way and are just
doing it because you can‘t help yourself..
I want to make clear that I was just doing what
Ghislaine had told me with the apartments. We were
not redecorating all of them at once as it tends to
get confusing. Jen was taking care of 8A and I was
doing 3F. First we moved everything out, then it got
painted and I picked new furniture from Ethan Allan,
which Ghislaine agreed to as it was going to be a
‘serious‘ & ‘mature’ apartment. Then Ghislaine left,
you said you hated Ethan Allan, I cancelled the
order, ordered white bedroom furniture from Crate&
Barrel. Then you said we should also change the
carpet in 3F, told me to decorate everything in a
completely different style than we initially
intended and get all the apartments done at the same
time; I was doing what I was told, first by
Ghislaine, then by you. That’s why it is taking this
long.
As far as the home show, I didn’t say I was
bothered by it, I was just pointing it out as one of
the things I wouldn’t have chosen to do, had you not
asked me to. I could have spent that time in a way,
you would appreciate more. But I don’t want to focus
on the home show as it was just a fraction of the
time I spend on the projects you gave me. I
explained that in the first email…
I’ve spent a lot of time in the past doing petty
things I thought were helpful but I learned that
neither one of us benefits from it. As a result you
are not any happier and I haven’t done anything for
myself. Since I met you, my life revolves around
you, there is nothing else I have and it makes me
feel very uneasy. I feel that I have no security;
like Jean Luc says , all my eggs are in one basket.
I don’t like taking things from you. I want to be
able to support myself. You are the expert in that,
you don’t believe in school; so how do I learn and
what ?
This is getting a little crazy, I love you.. I am
going to try to make this very clear; I can agree on
exercise, organizing fun things for you, whether
interesting massages and treatments or finding
interesting people and…fun sex things…What do you
imagine is a fun sex thing? I will do what I can
even though if this is simply about you having sex
with someone else, I don‘t know how it makes our
relationship better. I will try to find girls
whenever we are in New York . I‘ll speak to Nathalie
& try other places before having to go to clubs
though. Please, don’t expect a 360 turn by tomorrow.
It will probably take time until I get it right. I
suggest I stay in NY for a week or two, but it is up
to you. I would appreciate If you are not happy or
want something to happen, you just said it once and
clearly. In fact, you can send me a sentence in an
email so there is no confusion. Is there something
else that is important to you, or do we agree on
this?
PS: Here is a bonus; I will have a dinner with
Dana.
